message:
fix(fp-conformance): median multikey fixture + drop unused write_excel_bytes import (br-frankenpandas-ebjw)

Two independent issues unblocked in one commit:

1. Fixture FP-P2C-011/groupby_median_multikey_order_strict listed
   expected_series in input insertion order [(b,2),(a,1),(b,1)]. pandas
   default groupby([k1,k2]).median() sorts the MultiIndex, so actual
   output is [(a,1),(b,1),(b,2)] with values [40.0, 50.0, 20.0]. Same
   pattern as g90b's groupby_sum_order fix — realign expected to the
   pandas-default sorted form. packet_filter_runs_groupby_aggregate_matrix_packet
   now passes 30/30.

2. After 989b/mxho swapped both excel round-trip callers to
   write_excel_bytes_with_options, the legacy write_excel_bytes import
   became dead. Drops it from the fp_io use list so clippy -D warnings
   stays green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
